summary: Highly enthusiastic fan review praises the show’s energy (especially the drums) but gives no details on recording quality
review: The reviewer loves this performance, calling it “THE BOMB” and even using it as a wake‑up alarm for their kids, noting that the drum passages are especially powerful. No specific comments about song selection or audio fidelity are provided, so the technical quality remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review indicates strong enthusiasm for the show, but no recording details are given; rating reflects an excellent performance with unknown (assumed average) audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer mentions turning volume up for drums and a loud overall mix, but provides no information on clarity, balance, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
